title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for families to buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner families. A "Notification List Request" is available for applications which does NOT provide preference or any other advantage in applying for the homeownership program. 221 S Ash Street Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Families currently living in substandard housing who meet all of the following requirements: -Income guidelines -Can commit to partnership equity (working toward ownership in a multitude of ways) -United States citizens or permanent residents -Have not owned a home in the past 3 years -The ability to pay a mortgage payment; steady income and decent credit history Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 549-1193 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 549-1193 Kristina [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call or visit website for information -Email to be added to the application notification list. Write "Notification List Request" on email's subject line and include name, phone number, and email address in the body of the email. FEES: Households are responsible for closing costs/fees. Also required to save between $2,000-$7,000 to go towards closing costs. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Sisters, Sisters School District Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
